value_metric: two A0 adapters (网信办 + 国家数据局) with a document-type classifier that distinguishes public consultation, formal official document, interpretation, and news, keeping the official original text as primary -- so AI/cyber/data-governance policy enters as authoritative originals, not as interpretations or news

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: adapters + fixtures; the live cac.gov.cn classification ran from the dev env (0 cloud cost); nda.gov.cn live fetch is blocked (TLS/JS-shell) and needs a browser or RSS/API entry -- recorded as manual/pending, not faked
